    L

    listAllRooms() - Method in class pl.edu.agh.kis.pz1.service.HotelService
    Lists all rooms in the hotel.
    listAvailableRooms() - Method in class pl.edu.agh.kis.pz1.model.Hotel
    Returns a list of available (vacant) rooms.
    listAvailableRooms() - Method in class pl.edu.agh.kis.pz1.service.HotelService
    Lists all currently available (vacant) rooms.
    listPrices() - Method in class pl.edu.agh.kis.pz1.service.HotelService
    Returns current nightly prices for all rooms.
    listRooms() - Method in class pl.edu.agh.kis.pz1.model.Hotel
    Returns a list of all rooms in the hotel.
    loadFromCsv(String, String) - Static method in class pl.edu.agh.kis.pz1.io.HotelDataLoader
    Load hotel configuration and state from a CSV file.
